narrative:
Johnson Township has 2,263 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
